name: Ravenquay
description: River delta city. Dawn Blades home base. 1 day sail south of Trevash, 3 days sail south of Khemrise.

districts.name: Docks Ward
districts.description: Working harbor, rough, practical. Smells of fish and tar. Criminal element present.

districts.name: Merchant Quarter
districts.description: More respectable. Established businesses, better kept streets.

districts.name: River Quarter
districts.description: Sits on the significant river running through the city. River trade important.

districts.name: Trade District
districts.description: Established commercial area. Guard HQ adjacent.

districts.name: Old Quarter
districts.description: Older part of city, established. No specific locations pinned yet.

districts.name: Academic Quarter
districts.description: Implied by Cartographer's Guild presence. Not fully established.

locations.name: Revivify
locations.description: Former Kreel residence, deeded to Order of Solmir. Dawn Blades refuge. Formerly upper-class lodging, thoroughly ransacked, repaired without upper-class talent — visible stitching on cushions, mismatched paint, some torn wallpaper. Clean, warm, charming, carries its history.
locations.notes: Marcus managing. Miren and Dav assisting.

locations.name: Loan Dragon
locations.description: Reformed loan shark operation.
locations.notes: 70/30 split favoring Dawn Blades. Approximately 25-30g/month income.

locations.name: Gilt Rose
locations.description: Helena's establishment. Discreet, well-appointed, charges enough to keep out trouble. Information brokering center. Regular clientele from upper social layer.

locations.name: Shrike's Perch
locations.description: Neutral ground tavern with private Rookery meeting rooms. Near the Gilt Rose.

locations.name: Broken Compass Tavern
locations.description: Siv's regular haunt.

locations.name: Calla Denn's Workshop
locations.description: Leatherworker. Needle and hide sign above door. Smells of leather, oil, and something harder to place underneath.

locations.name: Torvald Ironwood's Workshop
locations.description: Weaponsmith.

locations.name: Overflow Warehouse
locations.description: Wooden warehouse, medium sized, had a small stone basement with cells in it that is magically reinforced to be waterproofed, necessary for the water table.
locations.notes: Long Arm Trading property.

locations.name: Guard HQ
locations.description: Captain Crane's domain. Holding cells inside.
locations.notes: Thorne, Roct, and Kael Voss held here. Duty sergeant recognizes Vaz on sight.

locations.name: The Arena
locations.description: Copper, Silver, and Gold tiers. Morning sessions start eighth bell. Betting available.
locations.notes: Dawn Blades registered as 'A Slice of Pie', Silver tier, record 2-0. Roct watching for tactical Veth assessment.

locations.name: Morrow and Selt
locations.description: Chandler's shop. Casvath coastal relay access point.
locations.notes: Ask for Morrow, say 'grey tide is running'. Messages sent within the hour along coastal road north.

locations.name: Wayward Warehouse
locations.description: Legitimate mercenary job board.
locations.notes: Erasmus probably checks here.

locations.name: Black Anchor Tavern
locations.description: Pretty rough and tumble place
locations.notes: Disrupted after Dren's death.

locations.name: Cartographer's Guild
locations.description: Run by Finwick Gearspring, elderly gnome. Exploration and ruins work.

locations.name: Harrow House Inn
locations.description: Cut above typical inn. Quiet. Three streets from the Gilt Rose.
locations.notes: Ossivane Relk stayed here before departing for Argentveil.

name: Khemrise
description: Major coastal city, vineyards, pivot point where coast turns north-south. 2 days sail north of Trevash, 3 days sail north of Ravenquay.
climate: Temperate maritime. Fog burns off by midmorning every day without exception — locals treat this as a moral certainty.
notes: Harvest festival approximately 12 days out from current story position.

features.name: The Tidebell
features.description: Massive bronze bell at harbor entrance, rung at high tide since founding. Everyone sets their day by it.

districts.name: Harbor District
districts.description: Loud, practical, international. Ships from four regions. Street food that doesn't exist anywhere else. Fish market operating continuously for two hundred years. Sailors' taverns with honest music most nights.

districts.name: Merchant Quarter
districts.description: Where money shows itself. Tailors, jewelers, antiquities, spice merchants. Establishments that don't need signs because their clientele already knows where they are.

districts.name: Old Quarter
districts.description: Pre-city construction. Narrow streets, buildings lean toward each other overhead. Artisans, bookbinders, glassblower known regionally, small theaters with rotating productions, century-old bathhouse.

districts.name: Northern Market
districts.description: Commercial district. Spice imports, warehouse operations.

districts.name: Vineyard Road
districts.description: Connects city to hillside estates. Market stalls on festival days.

locations.name: Vineyard Estate
locations.description: On a vineyard hill. Private road connecting to coastal route, bypasses main harbor fees. Formerly Thorne's. Acquired from Ostwick family for 6,000g.

areas.name: Main House
areas.notes: Kitchen where Vaz had morning tea. Fireplace Petra talks to. Study off east corridor used as Glicken's temporary detention room. Desk where Tova works.

areas.name: East Outbuilding
areas.description: Converted for refugee accommodation. Clean and dry. Converting long term for wine aging.

areas.name: Stable
areas.notes: Where Fennick settled during estate gathering.

areas.name: Courtyard
areas.description: Central gathering space. Trestle tables for mass feeding. Mounting block near stable.
areas.notes: Where Vaz addressed crowd of 23 freed people.

areas.name: Vineyard Rows
areas.description: Morning light cuts long shadows between vines. Views to coast from eastern edge on clear morning.

areas.name: Perimeter Wall
areas.notes: Jaygar installed four clockwork traffic-detection devices at corners and gates.

areas.name: Estate Road
areas.description: Curves up through vineyard rows from main road below.

locations.name: Harbormaster Building
locations.description: Solid two-story stone, official signage. Ground floor clerk window with queue. Exterior stairs to upper office. Curtained upper window, heavy door.
locations.notes: Harbor watch active on all three Dawn Blades ships.

locations.name: Copper Wheel
locations.description: Well-kept tavern. Sign freshly painted, windows clean. Better maintained than surroundings suggest it should be.
locations.notes: Used to be Toreval Caine's place

locations.name: Legend's Clinic
locations.description: Coppersalt Lane — narrow street that doesn't appear on official maps. Fish smell, old rope. Blue shutter, grey door, no sign. Everyone knows it, nobody talks about it.
locations.notes: Removes collars.

locations.name: Seris's Operative Room
locations.description: Rooming house on Coppervane Street. Second floor, end of hall. Proprietor asks nothing, charges by week.
locations.notes: Seris registered as Vel. Circle mark on doorframe indicated trouble.

locations.name: Salt Hook Tavern
locations.description: Harbor area. Bren the proprietor, no questions asked. Thorne connection, discreet.
locations.notes: Vaz has room paid week upfront. Two keys to bank strongbox held by Vaz.

locations.name: Merchant's Bank of Khemrise
locations.description: Solid stone, brass fittings, cool interior, wood paneled. Long counter with clerk. Strongbox room private, small, unremarkable.
locations.notes: Dawn Blades strongbox registered under assumed name, Salt Hook address. Contains: Thorne's false ledger, three property deeds, correspondence files, Harwick's signed confession, Belverbridge payment schedule letter, remaining Thorne negotiable notes (~39,000g).

locations.name: Drev's Office
locations.description: Thorngate Row. Ground floor warehouse, office above.
locations.notes: Went dark. Unoccupied now.

locations.name: Harwick's House
locations.description: Respectable merchant district. Neither wealthy enough to attract attention nor poor enough to suggest trouble. Front room carefully tidy.
locations.notes: Relay network documents on table.

locations.name: Corryn Mast
locations.description: Sailmaker.
locations.notes: Three sets Dawn Blades flags made here.

locations.name: Rosten Alurath's Antiquities Shop
locations.description: Antiquities dealer.
locations.notes: Worth a visit.

name: Trevash
description: Small coastal port, halfway between Ravenquay and Khemrise by sea. Rougher weather than Khemrise, more wind. Working port that doesn't attract leisure.

locations.name: Trevash Harbor
locations.description: Where Thorne's ship was spotted and captured. Fisherman's moorings. Where Veth's scout ship docked recently.
locations.notes: Aldric and Pell tie up at fisherman's moorings.

locations.name: Broken Tooth Cove
locations.description: 2 miles north of Trevash. Rock formation looks like a broken tooth from the water. Deep enough for a ship. Completely hidden from road.
locations.notes: Only Aldric and Pell know it. Offered to Dawn Blades as hidden anchorage asset.

locations.name: Waystation (Northern Road)
locations.description: On the road north of Trevash.
locations.notes: Wanted poster for Vaz posted here — 400g reward, Meridian Trading House contact. Road guard encounter happened here.

name: Millhaven
description: Mining town, 4 days north of Ravenquay inland. Significantly colder, real winters. Single road in and out, good natural sight lines from approaches.
notes: Something in the deep tunnels connected to Kerra's patron three years ago. Kerra has tactical intelligence from a contract two years ago — approach roads, mine operation, and sight lines mapped in her memory.

name: Brennswick
description: Farming village, 30 miles east of Khemrise. Half day travel on good roads. Continental climate — hot summers, cold winters, good growing season between. Flat farmland before terrain rises toward mountains.

locations.name: Petyr Ostwick's Farm
locations.description: Ostwick family farm.
locations.notes: Dawn Blades acquired the Khemrise vineyard estate from this family. Petyr based here.

name: Argentveil
description: Southernmost city on the western coast. Warmest and driest. Mediterranean feel — olive trees, stone architecture built for heat. Most cosmopolitan city in the region. 4-5 days sail east of Ravenquay.
notes: Chartered Investigators Act 15 years old, functioning, respected — model for Ravenquay charter. Beyond just being mediterranean style, Argentveil is also very magic-heavy. Dragonborn make up 40% of the population, many elves have found homes here along with plenty of others. Dwarves and orc-kin are now super rare. Various teiflings can be seen from time to time as well.  There are tall spires unlike any other city and a few districts have an abundance of wealth while others fill in the middle classes and the struggling. The docks are the safest in Aethermoor, crime finds its place elsewhere. Orvath lies a 6 day journed north/northeast over land into the drier climes, a fairly mild desert region.

locations.name: Argentveil City Council
locations.description: Sitting members include Galealzre and Serath Calvane. Trade committee where Calvane operates.

locations.name: The Glass Sipper
locations.description: Next door to a glassblower, all their pots and cups are hand-blown and unique. Some of them supposedly make the tea taste different and you never know what you'll get. The glassblower refuses to make anything he finds ugly, so it has a stamp of his personality inside as well.

locations.name: Linden Street Antiquities Market
locations.description: Where Ossivane Relk operates.
locations.notes: Find him Tuesdays. Third sending stone pair and compass available when Dawn Blades are ready.

locations.name: Crestline & Vane
locations.ownership: rented — Dawn Blades occupy upper floor
locations.notes: Trading house on main floor, unaffiliated. Dawn Blades rent 3 rooms upstairs. Merchant district location gives good cover and access. Handblown glass vase in the center of the commonroom table, won by Kerra in the halfweek festival games.

name: Valdmere
description: Frontier city, northwest coast. Coast faces south. Wilderness to the north. Two weeks sail from Khemrise. Drier, more extreme temperature swings. Less forgiving than the coast.
climate: Drier, more extreme temperature swings. Frontier feeling.

name: Cindermarch
description: Military fortress town, northeast of Khemrise. Border with Northern Reaches. Active conflict with whatever comes from the north. 3 days northeast of Khemrise, 1 day beyond Millhaven, 4-5 days ride from Ravenquay. Positioned between two rising mountain ranges, right where the weather changes. 90% of the winter there is snow to the north but not to the south.

locations.name: Cindermarch Fortress
locations.description: The fortress proper.
locations.notes: Salla Kern is Master-at-Arms. Where Kerra was enslaved before transfer to Khemrise estate. Caravan escort destination early campaign. Salla Kern sent job offer regarding Kerra — follow-up pending.

name: Orvath
description: Free city. No extradition, anonymous deposits. Location within the Western Reach unspecified.

locations.name: Orvath Banking Institution
locations.description: Anonymous deposits, no personal appearance required for withdrawal.

name: Wilderness & Roads
description: Named wilderness locations and road features across the Western Reach.

locations.name: Crossroads Rest
locations.description: Waystation approximately 2 days north of Ravenquay on the main road.

locations.name: Valley Ambush Site
locations.description: Natural funnel in highland terrain north of Ravenquay.
locations.notes: Where Malrik and Vess were intercepted by Dawn Blades. Both turned, sent north with false all-clear message.

locations.name: Coastal Road
locations.description: Runs between Ravenquay and Khemrise along the coast.
locations.notes: Casvath relay network operates along it. Harwick relay network being built alongside it with staging points.

locations.name: Verath Ohn
locations.description: Off the southern coast, in the water.
